name: Carrot Cake (Low Fat)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Crushed pineapple (from an 8 oz can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Line a 13 x 9 inch baking pan with foil and spray with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine the flour, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, nutmeg, and cloves.
4. In another bowl, beat together the sugar, crushed pineapple, vegetable oil, and vanilla until smooth.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
6. Stir in the shredded carrots.
7. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites with a whisk or electric mixer until stiff peaks form.
8. Fold 1 batch of the egg white mixture into the carrot mixture using a rubber spatula.
9. Fold in the remaining egg white mixture.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
11. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
13. Invert the cake onto wax paper, remove the pan and foil, and cut into 16 pieces.
